title: Math Rockets Averaging
description: In this game, youll have the opportunity to enhance your problem-solving skills and mathematical abilities. Your objective is simple: solve a series of averaging expressions by tapping the rocket and revealing the correct answer. With 10 expressions to solve in each level and 8 exciting challenges awaiting you, this game is designed to help you sharpen your math skills.
instructions: Use a mouse or touchpad to play this game
